form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation when last of 15 at Ellerslie November 4 over 1600m, soft track; 11 len behind Toruk Makto with 58.5kg at $47.70. First up last campaign ninth of 11 at Cambridge Synthetic July 10 over 1300m, 7 len behind Shamel Express carrying 56kg at $17.90. Among the main contenders.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at Waverley on March 18 over 1650m, 8 len behind Belle's Charm carrying 58.5kg at $42.50. The start before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 9th of 14 at Trentham on March 1 over 1600m, slow going 6 len behind Summit Up carrying 58.5kg at $96.90. Not among the chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 48-day let-up.
